home.aboutMeDesc: 5+ years front-end experience; large-scale Web apps and front-end architecture. Focus: AI platform and AI application front-end engineering—LLM apps, AI workflow, AI Agent, and multimodal AI interaction and architecture; familiar with AI chat, RAG, Workflow, and Agent front-end; builds scalable, maintainable AI platform products.

askAi.title: Ask AI about my experience

askAi.emptyHint: Try: "Is he a fit for an AI engineer role?" or "Introduce his AI projects"
askAi.footer: Answers are based on resume only. Requires OPENAI_API_KEY.
